title: Pan-Seared Xiaolongbao with Miso Glaze
description: A fusion dish combining the traditional Chinese soup dumplings with a savory miso glaze. A perfect appetizer or snack.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine miso paste, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and grated ginger.
Whisk until smooth and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and let the glaze simmer for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 2 tbsp of oil and sear the xiaolongbao until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
Remove the dumplings from the skillet and place them on a plate.
Brush the miso glaze over the xiaolongbao and garnish with pickled beet and glazed Chinese mustard.
